projects.name: RuleCatch
projects.description: Real-time rule enforcement for Claude Code. 208+ rules across 18 categories catch violations as they happen, zero token overhead, AES-256-GCM encrypted, GDPR-compliant with full US/EU data isolation.

projects.name: StrictDB
projects.description: Unified database driver, one API for MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, SQLite, and Elasticsearch. AI-first guardrails, self-correcting errors, schema discovery, and an MCP server with 14 tools.

projects.name: The Zodiac Solved
projects.description: Cryptographic analysis identifying the Zodiac Killer through decoded cipher evidence. Systematic extraction of hidden messages revealing the name and address encoded in the infamous ciphers.

projects.name: DockerDoctor
projects.description: Interactive CLI that lints your Dockerfile, compose file, and running containers. 50 checks across 11 categories with auto-fix, TUI browser, and CI/CD integration.

projects.name: Classpresso
projects.description: Build-time CSS class consolidation tool. Reduces browser workload by eliminating redundant utility classes. 50% faster style recalculation and 42% faster First Paint.

projects.name: ClassMCP
projects.description: Semantic CSS framework for AI code generation. MCP server that reduces token consumption by ~90% compared to verbose utility classes. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, and more.

projects.name: TerseJSON
projects.description: Transparent JSON key compression library. Reduces memory usage and network bandwidth by 30–80% using lazy-loading proxies that only allocate memory for accessed fields.

projects.name: CredHopper
projects.description: Chrome extension for multi-profile credential management. Organize credentials by client, one-click autofill, AES-256-GCM encryption. Built for agencies and freelancers.

projects.name: Kactuz Music
projects.description: Contemporary Christian music bringing the living Word of God to music. Soulful vocals, cinematic textures, and pop-infused worship arrangements rooted in Scripture.

projects.name: Sacred Spaces Build
projects.description: Premium contractor services website for Sacred Spaces NYC, Inc. High-end custom homes, seamless additions, and transformative remodels in the greater New York area.

projects.name: Wavesurf React Player
projects.description: Production-ready React audio player with waveform visualization. Global state management, pre-computed peaks for instant rendering, persistent mini-player, and TypeScript support.
